phase_name: Packaging — Makefile, App Bundle, DMG, First-Launch Setup, and Ollama Check
goal: Produce a distributable `YapTap.app` bundle and `YapTap.dmg` disk image via a `Makefile`. Add the remaining Phase 3 runtime behaviours: bundle-aware resource path resolution, first-launch Python venv setup (with a progress alert), venv-based Python interpreter resolution, and an Ollama availability probe before the LLM step.

in_scope: Makefile with build / icns / app / dmg / clean targets
resources_dir() in config.rs: bundle-aware Resources/ resolution for scripts, prompts, icons
transcribe_script_path() and llm_script_path() updated to check <resources>/scripts/ first
python_interpreter() helper: returns venv python if present, else 'python3'
run_transcription() and run_llm_collect() updated to use python_interpreter()
run_pipeline_inner() python3 preflight updated to use python_interpreter()
First-launch Python setup: venv creation at ~/.config/yaptap/.venv/, pip install openai-whisper ollama, ffmpeg alert
ollama_available(): TCP probe to 127.0.0.1:11434 before LLM step
Verification tasks for bundle structure, DMG, first-launch setup, and Ollama check

tasks.title: Create `Makefile` at project root with `build`, `icns`, `app`, `dmg`, and `clean` targets
tasks.description: Create `Makefile` at the project root (source-controlled). Content must match the spec in `specs/packaging.md` exactly: `build` compiles the Rust binary in release mode; `icns` generates all ten iconset sizes from `assets/icons/yaptap-idle@2x.png` via `sips` then calls `iconutil -c icns`; `app` depends on `build` and `icns`, assembles `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/` (MacOS/, Resources/config/prompts/, Resources/icons/, Resources/scripts/, Info.plist, YapTap.icns); `dmg` depends on `app`, creates `dist/dmg-staging/`, copies the app, adds an `/Applications` symlink, calls `hdiutil create -format UDZO`, removes staging; `clean` calls `cargo clean` and removes `dist/`, the iconset dir, and the `.icns` file. All five targets declared `.PHONY`.
checks: Run `make build` — confirm exit 0 and `target/release/yaptap` exists.
Run `make icns` — confirm `assets/icons/AppIcon.iconset/` contains all ten PNG files and `assets/icons/YapTap.icns` is generated.

Run `make app` — confirm `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/MacOS/yaptap` exists (executable), `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Info.plist` exists, `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Resources/config/prompts/` contains all TOML files, `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Resources/icons/` contains all four PNGs, `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Resources/scripts/transcribe.py` and `llm.py` exist, `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Resources/YapTap.icns` exists.
Run `make dmg` — confirm `dist/YapTap.dmg` is created.
Run `make clean` — confirm `dist/` is removed, `assets/icons/AppIcon.iconset/` is removed, `assets/icons/YapTap.icns` is removed, `target/` is removed.

tasks.title: Create `assets/Info.plist` with all required bundle keys
tasks.description: Create `assets/Info.plist` (source-controlled; copied into the bundle by `make app`). Required keys and values as specified in `specs/packaging.md`: CFBundleIdentifier=com.yaptap.app, CFBundleName=YapTap, CFBundleDisplayName=YapTap, CFBundleVersion=0.3.0, CFBundleShortVersionString=0.3, CFBundleIconFile=YapTap, CFBundleExecutable=yaptap, CFBundlePackageType=APPL, LSUIElement=true (boolean), LSMinimumSystemVersion=12.0, NSHighResolutionCapable=true (boolean), NSMicrophoneUsageDescription='YapTap records audio to transcribe your speech.', NSPrincipalClass=NSApplication.
checks: Confirm `assets/Info.plist` exists and is valid XML plist: run `plutil -lint assets/Info.plist` — exit 0.
Confirm `plutil -p assets/Info.plist` shows all required keys with correct values.
Confirm LSUIElement is a boolean true (not string 'true').
Run `make app` — confirm `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Info.plist` is identical to `assets/Info.plist`.

tasks.title: Add `dist/`, `assets/icons/AppIcon.iconset/`, and `assets/icons/YapTap.icns` to `.gitignore`
tasks.description: Append three lines to `.gitignore` (all generated artifacts that must not be committed): `dist/`, `assets/icons/AppIcon.iconset/`, `assets/icons/YapTap.icns`. These match the spec's 'New Files' table. The existing entries (`/target/`, `**/__pycache__/`, `*.pyc`) must be preserved.
checks: Run `cat .gitignore` — confirm all three new lines are present alongside the existing entries.
Run `make app` then `git status` — confirm `dist/` and the generated icon files do not appear as untracked.
Confirm `assets/Info.plist` and `Makefile` DO appear as new untracked files (they are source-controlled).

tasks.title: Add `pub fn resources_dir() -> PathBuf` to `src/config.rs`
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
Verify in a unit test or by inspection: from a dev build at `target/debug/yaptap`, `resources_dir()` returns the project root (current working directory).

After `make app`, run `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/MacOS/yaptap --list-prompts` — the binary is inside the bundle and `../Resources` exists, so `resources_dir()` should resolve to `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Resources/`.

tasks.title: Update `prompts_dir()` in `src/config.rs` to check `resources_dir().join("config/prompts")` first
tasks.description: Currently `prompts_dir()` tries (1) `<binary_dir>/config/prompts` then (2) `<cwd>/config/prompts`. When the binary runs from inside the bundle, `resources_dir()` returns `Contents/Resources/`; the prompts are at `Contents/Resources/config/prompts/`. Update `prompts_dir()` to try `resources_dir().join("config/prompts")` as the first candidate (before the existing binary-dir candidate), returning it if the directory exists.
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
Dev build from project root: `prompts_dir()` should still resolve to `config/prompts/` (via cwd fallback).
After `make app`, run the bundled binary with `--list-prompts`; confirm the prompts listed match those in `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Resources/config/prompts/`.

tasks.title: Update `transcribe_script_path()` in `src/transcription.rs` to check `resources_dir().join("scripts/transcribe.py")` first
tasks.description: Currently `transcribe_script_path()` checks (1) `<binary_dir>/../../src/core/transcribe.py` then (2) `<binary_dir>/src/core/transcribe.py` then falls back to `src/core/transcribe.py`. The bundle layout places the script at `Contents/Resources/scripts/transcribe.py`. Prepend a new first candidate: `crate::config::resources_dir().join("scripts/transcribe.py")`, using the existing `parent().is_dir()` guard. The function signature and return type are unchanged.
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
Dev build: `transcribe_script_path()` should still resolve to `src/core/transcribe.py` relative to the project root.
After `make app`, trigger a recording cycle from the bundled binary; confirm the pipeline does not fail with 'can't open file' for transcribe.py.

tasks.title: Update `llm_script_path()` in `src/llm.rs` to check `resources_dir().join("scripts/llm.py")` first
tasks.description: Mirror the change from P8-T006 in `src/llm.rs`: prepend `crate::config::resources_dir().join("scripts/llm.py")` as the first candidate in `llm_script_path()`, before the existing `src/core/` fallbacks. Use the same `parent().is_dir()` guard.
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
Dev build: `llm_script_path()` should still resolve to `src/core/llm.py` relative to the project root.
After `make app`, trigger a recording cycle with a prompt selected from the bundled binary; confirm the LLM step does not fail with 'can't open file' for llm.py.

tasks.title: Add `pub fn python_interpreter() -> String` to `src/config.rs`
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
With no venv present: `python_interpreter()` returns `"python3"`.
After first-launch setup creates the venv (P8-T012 / P8-T013): `python_interpreter()` returns an absolute path ending in `/.venv/bin/python`.

tasks.title: Update `run_transcription()` in `src/transcription.rs` to use `crate::config::python_interpreter()`
tasks.description: Replace `Command::new("python3")` in `run_transcription()` with `Command::new(crate::config::python_interpreter())`. This is a one-line change. All other logic is unchanged.
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
With venv present: running a recording cycle calls the venv python for transcription, not system python3.

tasks.title: Update `run_llm_collect()` in `src/llm.rs` to use `crate::config::python_interpreter()`
tasks.description: Replace `Command::new("python3")` in `run_llm_collect()` with `Command::new(crate::config::python_interpreter())`. One-line change; all other logic unchanged.
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
With venv present: running a recording cycle with a prompt selected calls the venv python for the LLM step.

tasks.title: Update the python3 preflight in `run_pipeline_inner()` to use `crate::config::python_interpreter()`
tasks.description: In `run_pipeline_inner()` in `src/app.rs`, the preflight check at the top does `Command::new("python3").arg("--version")`. Replace `"python3"` with `crate::config::python_interpreter()` so the check validates the interpreter that will actually be used for transcription and LLM. The error message on failure should also reflect the interpreter path: `format!("python not found at {}", crate::config::python_interpreter())`.
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
With venv present: the preflight passes because the venv python exists.
With no python at all: the preflight fails and returns an appropriate error.

tasks.title: Add `fn run_first_launch_setup()` to `src/app.rs`
tasks.description:
Add a function that performs first-launch Python dependency installation:

1. **Call `NSApp.activateIgnoringOtherApps(true)`** (unsafe objc) to bring the LSUIElement app to front so the alert is visible.
2. **Create and display a progress NSAlert** with message "Setting up YapTap…\n\nInstalling Python dependencies. This takes about 30 seconds." with no user buttons (or one hidden button used only for programmatic dismissal — see below).
3. **Spawn a background thread** that runs sequentially:
   - `python3 -m venv ~/.config/yaptap/.venv` (exit code checked)
   - `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/bin/pip install --quiet openai-whisper ollama` (exit code checked)
   - Sends a `Result<(), String>` over an `mpsc::channel` when done.
4. **Pump the NSApp event loop** (using the same `nextEventMatchingMask:untilDate:inMode:dequeue:` pattern as the main event loop, 16 ms timeout) in a `loop { if rx.try_recv().is_ok() { break; } }` until the channel signals completion.
5. **Dismiss the alert**: call `[alert_window orderOut: nil]` (unsafe objc) on the main thread.
6. **On setup success**: check `which ffmpeg` via `Command::new("which").arg("ffmpeg")`; if exit non-zero, call `show_alert("ffmpeg not found", "YapTap requires ffmpeg for audio processing.\nInstall it with: brew install ffmpeg", &["OK"])`.
7. **On setup failure** (either command exits non-zero): call `show_alert("Setup failed", "YapTap could not install Python dependencies. Ensure python3 is installed and try launching again.", &["OK"])`; do NOT write any sentinel file — absence of `.venv/bin/python` triggers retry on next launch. Continue startup regardless.
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
Remove `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/` if present. Launch `./target/debug/yaptap` from a terminal. Confirm the 'Setting up YapTap…' alert appears within 1 second of launch.
After ~30 seconds (pip install), confirm the alert auto-dismisses and the app continues to show the menu bar icon.
Confirm `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/bin/python` and `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/bin/pip` exist.
Simulate failure (temporarily rename python3): confirm 'Setup failed' alert appears and the app still starts (menu bar icon visible).
With ffmpeg absent (if testable): confirm 'ffmpeg not found' alert appears after setup completes.

tasks.title: Call `run_first_launch_setup()` during startup in `run_app()` when venv is absent
checks: With venv absent: launching the app triggers setup alert.
With venv present (second launch): `run_first_launch_setup()` is NOT called; startup proceeds directly to the menu bar icon.
Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.

tasks.title: Add `fn ollama_available() -> bool` to `src/app.rs`
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
With Ollama running (`ollama serve`): `ollama_available()` returns true.
With Ollama stopped: `ollama_available()` returns false within ~1 second.

tasks.title: Probe Ollama availability before `run_llm_collect()` in `run_pipeline_inner()`
checks: Run `cargo build` exit 0; `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` clean.
With Ollama stopped and a prompt selected: after stopping recording, confirm the 'Ollama not running' alert appears and the icon returns to idle.
With 'No Prompt' selected: recording → transcription completes normally even if Ollama is not running (no probe attempted).
With Ollama running and a prompt selected: pipeline completes normally (no false-positive alert).

tasks.title: Verify `cargo build --release` and `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` pass clean after all packaging changes
tasks.description: After completing P8-T001 through P8-T015, run a full build and lint pass to confirm no regressions were introduced by the packaging changes.
checks: Run `cargo build --release` — exit 0.
Run `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` — no warnings, exit 0.
Run `cargo test` — all tests pass.

tasks.title: Verify `make app` produces the correct `dist/YapTap.app` directory structure
tasks.description: After P8-T001 and P8-T002 are done, run `make app` and inspect the resulting bundle layout.
checks: Run `make app` — exit 0.
Confirm `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/MacOS/yaptap` is a Mach-O executable: `file dist/YapTap.app/Contents/MacOS/yaptap` shows 'Mach-O 64-bit executable arm64' or 'x86_64'.
Confirm `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Info.plist` exists: `plutil -lint dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Info.plist` exit 0.
Confirm prompts: `ls dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Resources/config/prompts/*.toml` shows all five prompt files.
Confirm icons: all four PNGs present in `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Resources/icons/`.
Confirm scripts: `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Resources/scripts/transcribe.py` and `llm.py` exist.
Confirm app icon: `dist/YapTap.app/Contents/Resources/YapTap.icns` exists.
Launch `dist/YapTap.app` from Finder — confirm menu bar icon appears, no crash.

tasks.title: Verify `make dmg` produces a working `dist/YapTap.dmg`
tasks.description: Run `make dmg` and verify the resulting disk image.
checks: Run `make dmg` — exit 0 and prints 'Built: dist/YapTap.dmg'.
Mount the DMG: `open dist/YapTap.dmg` — Finder shows a volume named 'YapTap'.
Confirm the volume contains `YapTap.app` and an `Applications` symlink.
Drag `YapTap.app` to the Applications symlink — app copies to `/Applications/YapTap.app`.
Eject the DMG.
Launch `/Applications/YapTap.app` — confirm menu bar icon appears and all pipeline functions work.

tasks.title: Smoke test first-launch setup from the bundled app
tasks.description: Verify the first-launch Python setup flow end-to-end from the bundled binary (P8-T012 / P8-T013).
checks: Remove the venv if present: `rm -rf ~/.config/yaptap/.venv`.
Launch `dist/YapTap.app` — confirm the 'Setting up YapTap…' alert appears within 1 second.
Wait for the alert to auto-dismiss (~30 seconds).
Confirm `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/bin/python` exists after dismissal.
Confirm `~/.config/yaptap/.venv/bin/pip` exists.
Press the hotkey, speak a phrase, press again — confirm transcription succeeds (no 'python not found' error).
Second launch (venv exists): confirm the setup alert does NOT appear and the app starts directly.

tasks.title: Smoke test Ollama availability check from the bundled app
tasks.description: Verify the Ollama probe (P8-T014 / P8-T015) produces the correct alert and does not block the 'No Prompt' path.
checks: Ensure Ollama is NOT running: `pkill ollama` or quit the Ollama app.
Select any prompt from the menu bar dropdown.
Press the hotkey, speak a phrase, press again to stop.
Confirm an alert appears: 'Ollama not running. Start Ollama and try again…'.
Confirm the icon returns to idle after dismissing the alert.
Switch to 'No Prompt' in the menu.
Press the hotkey, speak, stop — confirm transcription completes and the raw transcript is on the clipboard (no Ollama alert).
Start Ollama (`ollama serve`), re-select a prompt, repeat the hotkey cycle — confirm the LLM step completes and the result is on the clipboard.
